productDisplayName: Wills Lifestyle Men Leather Black Belt
description: Style Note A formal essential, the belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wills lifestyle perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. The superior quality, distinctive style and meticulous attention to detail make each item in Wills Lifestyle a class apart. Wear this piece with formal trousers or denims. Product Details Black braided leather belt, has a tang clasp for a snug Fit and fixed leather loop to hold belt in place  Material and Care 100% Leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight Size  Length: 85 cm
